message.content:
@startuml
title Kubectl Request

actor "kubectl" as kubectl
participant "K8s Auth Proxy" as authProxy
participant "K8s API Server" as apiServer
participant "Hydra" as hydra

note right of kubectl
  Set the correct cluster with
  server pointing to the k8auth
  in the kubectl config
end note

kubectl -> authProxy: GET: https://k8s.dolittle.cloud/api/pods\nHeader: { Authentication: Bearer <token> }

authProxy -> hydra: GET: http://hydra.system-auth.svc.cluster.local/userinfo

alt [If good token]
  hydra --> authProxy: Status 200 { claims... }
  authProxy -> apiServer: Impersonate: Hydra-User-Info\nGET: https://<local-cluster-url>/api/pods
  apiServer --> authProxy: Status 200 (results)
  authProxy --> kubectl: Status 200 (results)
else [If bad/no token]
  hydra --> authProxy: Status 401
  authProxy --> kubectl: Status 401
end

@enduml
